evals.prompt: 我想做一个 H5 直播间优惠券领取功能，涉及按钮、领取弹窗和后端领取接口，按全栈 workflow 执行。
evals.expected_output: Triggers the fullstack-feature-workflow skill, starts at requirement clarification/brainstorming, identifies UI and API contract impact, requires Contract SSOT before implementation, then routes to writing-plans and sdd-run rather than jumping straight into code.
expectations: Uses the fullstack-feature-workflow skill rather than sdd-run directly.
Starts with requirement clarification / brainstorming and does not write implementation code immediately.
Identifies both UI impact and API contract impact.
Requires Contract SSOT before frontend/backend implementation.
Routes to writing-plans before any sdd-run execution.

evals.prompt: 给 Admin 商品列表加一个纯前端排序下拉，不改接口，按 workflow 做。
evals.expected_output: Uses the workflow but chooses the minimal frontend-only path: requirement clarification, small UI brief or existing design system instead of mandatory three variants, no Contract SSOT, writing-plans, frontend sdd-run, and knowledge update review/no-op.
expectations: Uses the fullstack-feature-workflow skill because the user explicitly asked for workflow.
Classifies the task as frontend-only with no contract impact.
Skips Contract SSOT and backend implementation stages.
Allows a single UI brief or existing design-system path instead of mandatory ui-design-trio variants.
Still routes through writing-plans before frontend sdd-run.

evals.prompt: 为 auction-service 增加一个内部结算 RPC，涉及 product-service 订单创建和金额字段。
evals.expected_output: Classifies the task as backend/cross-service and large-demand shape, skips UI design, requires Contract SSOT including RPC/API boundary, X-User-ID/auth if relevant, shopspring/decimal money fields, no direct cross-service DB access, then splits writing-plans and sdd-run by affected backend service or contract boundary without creating an empty frontend loop.
expectations: Uses the fullstack-feature-workflow skill for a cross-service backend feature.
Skips UI design because there is no UI surface.
Requires Contract SSOT with caller/callee RPC or API boundary.
Includes repository constraints: no direct cross-service DB access and money fields use shopspring/decimal.
Splits execution by affected backend service or shared contract boundary, not by an empty frontend/backend template.
